title: Iron Ore Trade Flows
summary:
Main
Dry Weekly Market Monitor - Week 24, 2025 Snapshot of Spot Freight Rates, Supply-Demand Trends, Port Congestions June 13, 2025
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2025-06-13 133816.png | assets/2025-06-13_iron-ore-trade-flows_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_542582629a53.png
This week's Market Monitor highlights the strong performance in Capesize iron ore flows, which have continued to support demand throughout the year. This trend is reflected in the recent strengthening of the Baltic Capesize Index and average earnings on the C5TC route. Bauxite shipments have also played a notable role in supporting Capesize fleet employment, with a significant increase in volumes from Guinea to China during the first quarter of the year.
